candidate_definitions.text: A SQLite extension for quickly generating random numbers, booleans, characters, and blobs

A SQLite extension for quickly generating random numbers, booleans, characters, and blobs. **Not cryptographically secure.** Based on [`sqlite-loadable-rs`](https://github.com/asg017/sqlite-loadable-rs) and the [fastrand crate](https://crates.io/crates/fastrand).`

candidate_glosses.text: A SQLite extension for quickly generating random numbers, booleans, characters, and blobs. **Not cryptographically secure.** Based on [`sqlite-loadable-rs`](https://github.com/asg017/sqlite-loadable-rs) and the [fastrand crate](https://crates.io/crates/fastrand).`
